# Hepatitis B and hepatic fibrosis

## Abstract

**Conclusion:** We found no synergy between hepatitis B infection and metabolic
dysfunction (interaction OR 1.04, 95% CI 0.75-1.44). The study was powered to
detect an interaction odds ratio of 1.5, and the confidence interval excludes
effects larger than that threshold, so a modest interaction cannot be excluded.

## Conclusion

The wide confidence interval means this null should be read as inconclusive
rather than as evidence of no interaction.
